notes: Starter state: units begin at max HP from rulesets/territory-v1/units.json.
E003 locked starter: max-HP starter board copied from territory-v1 with ruleset id changed to territory-v1-locked.
E005 map-access starter: max-HP starter board copied from E003 and retargeted to sketch-v2-access.
E006 cost-6 starter: copied from E005 access starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6.
turn-001: P1 opened by taking the northeast supply center and pushing support toward the east lane.
turn-002: P2 answered with the west-south capture and kept both support units near the south lane.
turn-003: P1 claimed center-east and reached the first cost-6 recruit threshold without spending yet.
turn-004: P2 reached center-south, creating a two-center defensive economy before the first recruit.
turn-005: P1 converted the fast map access into center and center-north control, then recruited a delayed raider.
turn-006: P2 used both scouts to chip the exposed center scout and recruited the first delayed guardian.
turn-007: P1 damaged the lead P2 scout and recruited a delayed scout for continued center flips.
turn-008: P2 healed the lead scout and added a second delayed guardian rather than trading units immediately.
turn-009: P1 killed the wounded center-south scout and added a delayed raider.
turn-010: P2 removed the wounded P1 scout and shifted the guardian screen toward center-south.
turn-011: P1 flipped northwest and recruited another delayed scout, but the unit lead stayed below the win threshold.
turn-012: P2 healed the last scout, recruited a druid, and kept the center-south screen intact.
turn-013: P1 killed the remaining P2 scout and recruited another delayed raider.
turn-014: P2 killed the exposed P1 scout and recruited a third guardian to avoid the immediate unit-count loss.
